add-png-logo-to-first-page.title: Add PNG Logo to First Page of PDF
add-png-logo-to-first-page.description: Shows how to load a PDF, ensure source files exist, and insert a PNG logo onto the first page at specific coordinates using Aspose.Pdf.

add-background-image-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Background Image to All PDF Pages with Opacity
add-background-image-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to load a PDF, place a semi‑transparent background image on every page, and save the modified document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-transparent-png-overlay-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Transparent PNG Overlay to PDF Pages
add-transparent-png-overlay-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to overlay a transparent PNG image on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, ensuring the image appears above existing content.

add-diagonal-image-watermark-to-pdf.title: Add Diagonal Image Watermark to PDF
add-diagonal-image-watermark-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to overlay a semi‑transparent image watermark rotated 45° on each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-centered-company-logo-to-first-pdf-p.title: Add Centered Company Logo to First PDF Page
add-centered-company-logo-to-first-pdf-p.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, placing a logo image at the center of the first page using an ImageStamp, and saving the modified document.

add-decorative-header-image-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Decorative Header Image to Each PDF Page
add-decorative-header-image-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to insert a header image at the top of every page in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, positioning it so it doesn't overlap existing content.

add-decorative-footer-image-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Decorative Footer Image to Each PDF Page
add-decorative-footer-image-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, loop through all pages, and add a footer image that scales proportionally to the page width before saving the document.

add-background-pattern-image-to-pdf-page.title: Add Background Pattern Image to PDF Pages
add-background-pattern-image-to-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to overlay a semi‑transparent pattern image as a background on every page of an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-background-pattern-image-to-pdf-page.title: Add Background Pattern Image with Low Opacity to PDF Pages
add-background-pattern-image-to-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to overlay a semi‑transparent pattern image as a background on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-background-image-to-pdf-pages__v2.title: Add Background Image to PDF Pages
add-background-image-to-pdf-pages__v2.description: Shows how to embed a background image on every page of a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and adjust its opacity for a subtle shading effect.

add-background-texture-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Background Texture Image to PDF Pages
add-background-texture-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to place a texture image as the background of every page in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's BackgroundImage property.

add-semi-transparent-overlay-image-to-pd.title: Add Semi-Transparent Overlay Image to PDF
add-semi-transparent-overlay-image-to-pd.description: Demonstrates how to apply a semi‑transparent PNG overlay to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, scaling the image to cover the full page.

add-theme-based-overlay-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Theme‑Based Overlay to PDF Pages
add-theme-based-overlay-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates loading a JSON theme configuration, parsing default and per‑page colors, and applying a semi‑transparent background overlay to each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-semi-transparent-image-watermark-to-.title: Add Semi-Transparent Image Watermark to PDF Pages
add-semi-transparent-image-watermark-to-.description: Demonstrates how to overlay a PNG watermark image on each page of a PDF with configurable opacity using Aspose.Pdf.

replace-jpeg-with-high-res-png.title: Replace JPEG with High-Resolution PNG on PDF Page
replace-jpeg-with-high-res-png.description: Demonstrates how to replace an existing image on the third page of a PDF with a higher‑resolution PNG using the Resources.Images collection.

replace-jpeg-with-png-in-pdf.title: Replace JPEG Images with PNG in PDF
replace-jpeg-with-png-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to locate all JPEG images in a PDF document and replace them with a PNG image while preserving the original position, size, and transformations using Aspose.Pdf.

replace-raster-images-with-vector-graphi.title: Replace Raster Images with Vector Graphics in PDF
replace-raster-images-with-vector-graphi.description: Demonstrates how to extract existing vector graphics, remove raster images from each page, and save an optimized PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

replace-images-on-odd-pages.title: Replace Images on Odd PDF Pages with Placeholder
replace-images-on-odd-pages.description: Demonstrates how to iterate over odd‑numbered pages of a PDF and replace each existing image with a placeholder graphic while preserving the original image dimensions.

replace-images-odd-pages-qr-placeholder.title: Replace Images on Odd PDF Pages with QR Placeholder
replace-images-odd-pages-qr-placeholder.description: Loads a PDF, iterates over odd‑numbered pages, finds each image placement and replaces the image with a generated PNG that serves as a QR‑code placeholder containing page and position information.

convert-even-pdf-pages-to-grayscale.title: Convert Even PDF Pages to Grayscale
convert-even-pdf-pages-to-grayscale.description: Loads a PDF, converts each even‑numbered page to grayscale using Aspose.Pdf, and saves the modified document.

replace-images-with-banner-last-page.title: Replace Images on Last PDF Page with Full-Width Banner
replace-images-with-banner-last-page.description: Shows how to hide all existing images on the last page of a PDF and add a single banner image that spans the page width using Aspose.Pdf.

compress-large-images-in-pdf.title: Compress Large Images in PDF to Reduce File Size
compress-large-images-in-pdf.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's optimization features to compress images (e.g., those over 1 MB) by adjusting quality and resolution, then save a smaller PDF.

replace-images-with-placeholders.title: Replace PDF Images with Placeholder and Hyperlink
replace-images-with-placeholders.description: Demonstrates how to replace each image in a PDF with a gray placeholder rectangle and add a hyperlink annotation that points to the original image location.

replace-images-with-monochrome-in-pdf.title: Replace Images with Monochrome Versions in PDF
replace-images-with-monochrome-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through a PDF, detect images with a specific palette, convert them to grayscale, and replace the originals using Aspose.Pdf.

correct-exif-orientation-in-pdf.title: Correct EXIF Orientation of Images in PDF
correct-exif-orientation-in-pdf.description: Iterates through all images in a PDF, detects EXIF orientation metadata, rotates or flips the image accordingly, and replaces the original image with the corrected version.

compress-pdf-images.title: Compress Images in PDF to Reduce File Size
compress-pdf-images.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to compress images within a PDF by applying JPEG compression and optional resolution limits, then saving the optimized document.

replace-pdf-images-with-qr-placeholder.title: Replace PDF Images with QR Code Placeholder
replace-pdf-images-with-qr-placeholder.description: Shows how to walk through each page of a PDF, replace every embedded image with a QR‑code placeholder image, and save the updated document.

replace-images-on-pdf-page.title: Replace Images on a Specific PDF Page
replace-images-on-pdf-page.description: Shows how to replace selected images on a given PDF page by mapping image indices to new image file paths.

replace-pdf-images-with-icc-profile.title: Replace PDF Images with ICC‑Profile Versions
replace-pdf-images-with-icc-profile.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through each page of a PDF and replace its images with JPEGs that contain embedded ICC profiles using Aspose.Pdf.

replace-images-with-logo.title: Replace Images on PDF Pages with a New Logo
replace-images-with-logo.description: Demonstrates how to locate all image placements on each page of a PDF using ImagePlacementAbsorber and replace them with a specified logo image.

replace-title-page-images-with-high-res-.title: Replace Title Page Images with High-Resolution Banner
replace-title-page-images-with-high-res-.description: Loads a PDF, accesses the first (title) page, and replaces all existing images on that page with a high‑resolution banner while preserving the existing text layout.

replace-index-page-images-with-banner.title: Replace Index Page Images with a Banner Image
replace-index-page-images-with-banner.description: Shows how to load a PDF, access the first page's image resources, and replace every existing image with a single banner JPEG for branding updates.

replace-pdf-images-with-placeholder.title: Replace All PDF Images with a Placeholder
replace-pdf-images-with-placeholder.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through each page, and replace every embedded image with a single placeholder image to protect confidential content.

remove-all-images-from-pdf.title: Remove All Images from a PDF
remove-all-images-from-pdf.description: Shows how to delete every image on each page of a PDF by clearing the page's image collection with Aspose.Pdf and saving the modified document.

remove-low-resolution-images-from-pdf.title: Remove Low-Resolution Images from PDF
remove-low-resolution-images-from-pdf.description: Shows how to scan each page of a PDF, use ImagePlacementAbsorber to find images, and delete those with a horizontal or vertical DPI lower than 72 before optimizing and saving the document.

remove-low-resolution-images-from-pdf__v.title: Remove Low-Resolution Images from PDF
remove-low-resolution-images-from-pdf__v.description: Demonstrates how to scan each page of a PDF, detect images with a DPI lower than 72 using ImagePlacementAbsorber, and delete those images. The document is then optimized and saved.

remove-duplicate-images-from-pdf.title: Remove Duplicate Images from PDF
remove-duplicate-images-from-pdf.description: Iterates through all pages of a PDF, computes a hash for each image's raw bytes, and removes images that have already been encountered, effectively eliminating duplicate images.

collect-image-resolution-metadata.title: Collect Image Resolution Metadata from PDF Pages
collect-image-resolution-metadata.description: The example opens a PDF, iterates through each page, extracts all images using ImagePlacementAbsorber, and records their X/Y DPI resolution for reporting.

resize-images-half-size.title: Resize Images on PDF Pages to Half Size
resize-images-half-size.description: Shows how to iterate through each page of a PDF, extract embedded images, resize them to 50% of their original width and height, and replace the images back into the document using Aspose.Pdf.

resize-images-in-pdf-using-scaling-facto.title: Resize Images in PDF Using a Scaling Factor
resize-images-in-pdf-using-scaling-facto.description: Demonstrates how to read a scaling factor from a configuration file and apply it to all images in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf. The modified PDF is then saved to a new file.

resize-images-in-pdf-using-configurable-.title: Resize Images in PDF Using Configurable Scale Factor
resize-images-in-pdf-using-configurable-.description: Demonstrates reading a scaling factor from appsettings.json and applying it to all images in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

resize-images-on-pdf-pages.title: Resize Images on PDF Pages Using JSON Configuration
resize-images-on-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to read a JSON file that defines target dimensions per page, extract each image on those pages, resize it with System.Drawing, and replace it in the PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-raster-image-to-new-pdf-page.title: Add Raster Image to a New PDF Page
add-raster-image-to-new-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates inserting a raster image onto a newly added PDF page using Aspose.Pdf's Image class and the Paragraphs collection.

insert-raster-image-into-pdf.title: Insert Raster Image into PDF at Absolute Coordinates
insert-raster-image-into-pdf.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF, define a rectangle with absolute coordinates, and insert a raster image onto a specific page using Aspose.Pdf.

resize-embedded-raster-image.title: Resize Embedded Raster Image in PDF
resize-embedded-raster-image.description: Shows how to change the width and height of raster images embedded in a PDF by setting the FixWidth and FixHeight properties and then saving the document.

replace-image-on-pdf-page.title: Replace an Image on a PDF Page
replace-image-on-pdf-page.description: Shows how to replace an existing image on a PDF page with a new image loaded from a file stream using Aspose.Pdf.

delete-specific-raster-image-from-pdf-pa.title: Delete Specific Raster Image from PDF Page
delete-specific-raster-image-from-pdf-pa.description: Shows how to remove a raster image from a PDF page by deleting it from the page's image resources, which also clears its references in the page content.

extract-raster-images-from-pdf.title: Extract Raster Images from PDF to PNG
extract-raster-images-from-pdf.description: Loads a PDF document, iterates through each page's image resources, and saves every raster image as an individual PNG file.

extract-raster-images-from-pdf__v2.title: Extract Raster Images from PDF Preserving Original Format
extract-raster-images-from-pdf__v2.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through PDF pages, locate raster XImage objects, and save each image to disk while keeping its original format.

batch-extract-images-from-pdfs.title: Batch Extract Images from PDFs using Aspose.Pdf
batch-extract-images-from-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through PDF files in a folder, extract each embedded image from every page, and save them to organized output directories using Aspose.Pdf.

add-dicom-image-to-pdf-using-filestream.title: Add DICOM Image to PDF Using FileStream
add-dicom-image-to-pdf-using-filestream.description: Demonstrates loading a DICOM medical image from a FileStream and inserting it into a PDF page with Aspose.Pdf.

insert-dicom-image-with-custom-size.title: Insert DICOM Image with Custom Size into PDF
insert-dicom-image-with-custom-size.description: Demonstrates loading a DICOM image, setting its width and height, and adding it to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

render-pdf-page-to-png-with-fallback-fon.title: Render PDF Page to PNG with Fallback Font
render-pdf-page-to-png-with-fallback-fon.description: Demonstrates how to render the first page of a PDF document to a PNG image while specifying a fallback font using Aspose.Pdf's rendering options.

render-pdf-pages-to-jpeg-with-default-fo.title: Render PDF Pages to JPEG with Default Font Substitution
render-pdf-pages-to-jpeg-with-default-fo.description: Demonstrates how to convert each page of a PDF document to a high‑resolution JPEG image while specifying a default font for any missing glyphs.

generate-png-thumbnails-for-pdf-pages.title: Generate PNG Thumbnails for PDF Pages
generate-png-thumbnails-for-pdf-pages.description: Creates 150x200 pixel PNG thumbnail images for each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's ThumbnailDevice.

convert-pdf-to-png-using-arial-font.title: Render PDF Pages to PNG Using Arial as Default Font
convert-pdf-to-png-using-arial-font.description: The example loads a PDF document and converts each page to a PNG image, configuring the rendering options to use Arial as the default font for missing glyphs.

render-pdf-to-multi-page-tiff-lzw-font-f.title: Render PDF to Multi‑Page TIFF with LZW Compression and Font Fallback
render-pdf-to-multi-page-tiff-lzw-font-f.description: Loads a PDF, applies a default fallback font for missing characters, and converts all pages into a single multi‑page TIFF file using LZW compression.

export-pdf-pages-to-bmp-300-dpi.title: Export PDF Pages to BMP Images at 300 DPI
export-pdf-pages-to-bmp-300-dpi.description: Shows how to convert each page of a PDF document into a high‑resolution BMP image (300 DPI) using Aspose.Pdf rendering options.

convert-pdf-to-multi-page-tiff.title: Convert PDF to Multi‑Page TIFF with Default Font
convert-pdf-to-multi-page-tiff.description: Demonstrates how to convert an entire PDF document into a multi‑page TIFF file using Aspose.Pdf, specifying resolution, TIFF settings, and a default font for missing glyphs.

extract-vector-graphics-to-svg.title: Extract Vector Graphics from PDF Page to SVG
extract-vector-graphics-to-svg.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's GraphicsAbsorber to collect vector graphic elements from a specific PDF page and convert them into an SVG file for further manipulation.

move-extracted-vector-graphic.title: Move Extracted Vector Graphic to New Position
move-extracted-vector-graphic.description: Shows how to extract a vector graphic from a PDF page with GraphicsAbsorber, translate it by updating its Position (and matrix), and save the modified document.

transfer-vector-graphic-between-pdf-page.title: Transfer Vector Graphic Between PDF Pages with Position Offset
transfer-vector-graphic-between-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates extracting vector graphics from one PDF page, applying a translation offset (via a matrix or position adjustment), and placing the graphic onto another page using Aspose.Pdf.

remove-specific-vector-graphic-from-pdf-.title: Remove Specific Vector Graphic from PDF Page
remove-specific-vector-graphic-from-pdf-.description: Shows how to locate and delete a vector graphic on a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf's GraphicsAbsorber.

copy-vector-graphics-between-pdf-pages.title: Copy Vector Graphics Between PDF Pages
copy-vector-graphics-between-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to extract vector graphic elements from a source PDF page using GraphicsAbsorber and insert them into a destination PDF page.

add-extracted-vector-graphics-to-new-pdf.title: Add Extracted Vector Graphics to a New PDF Page
add-extracted-vector-graphics-to-new-pdf.description: Demonstrates extracting vector graphics from an existing PDF page using GraphicsAbsorber and adding them to a newly created page via a Graph container.

batch-extract-vector-graphics-from-pdfs.title: Batch Extract Vector Graphics from PDFs to SVG
batch-extract-vector-graphics-from-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to iterate over multiple PDF files, detect pages with vector graphics, and save each page's graphics as separate SVG files in dedicated folders.

set-alternative-text-for-pdf-images.title: Set Alternative Text for Images in PDF
set-alternative-text-for-pdf-images.description: Shows how to assign alternative text to each image in a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf to enhance accessibility for screen readers.

retrieve-image-alt-text.title: Retrieve and Log Alternative Text of PDF Images
retrieve-image-alt-text.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through each page and its images, extracts any alternative (alt) text associated with the images, and writes the results to the console for auditing.

add-image-with-alt-text-to-pdf.title: Add Image with Alternative Text to PDF
add-image-with-alt-text-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates inserting an image onto a PDF page and assigning alternative text for accessibility using Aspose.Pdf.

render-pdf-to-png-300-dpi.title: Render PDF to PNG at 300 DPI
render-pdf-to-png-300-dpi.description: Loads a PDF document, optionally sets a default font, and renders each page to a 300‑DPI PNG image using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-to-png-with-default-font.title: Convert PDF Pages to PNG with Default Font
convert-pdf-to-png-with-default-font.description: Loads a PDF, sets RenderingOptions.DefaultFontName to "Times New Roman", and converts each page to a 300 DPI PNG image.

replace-vector-with-raster-image.title: Replace Vector Graphic with Raster Image in PDF
replace-vector-with-raster-image.description: Demonstrates how to detect vector graphics on PDF pages, optionally extract them as SVG, and overlay a raster image at the same location using Aspose.Pdf.
